text.title: BABOK 50-Technique Lookup
text.summary: Quick-reference index of BABOK v3 Appendix A 50 BA techniques mapped to their primary use cases. Use as a router — once a technique is selected, read the BABOK section for inputs/outputs, not just this row.

rule.statement: Use the BABOK-50 table as a router only; after selecting a technique by name, read the BABOK inputs/outputs/applicability section before applying it.
rule.rationale: Agents picking techniques by name match without checking BABOK applicability produce the wrong artifact for the context — "Decision Analysis" selected for a prioritization task when "Prioritization" was the correct technique.

list.item: 1 — Acceptance and Evaluation Criteria: requirements validation, acceptance testing.
2 — Backlog Management: agile requirements, iteration planning.
3 — Balanced Scorecard: strategy analysis, performance measurement.
4 — Benchmarking and Market Analysis: current state analysis, competitive positioning.
5 — Brainstorming: elicitation, idea generation.
6 — Business Capability Analysis: strategy analysis, gap identification.
7 — Business Cases: change strategy, investment justification.
8 — Business Model Canvas: strategy analysis, business model design.
9 — Business Rules Analysis: requirements analysis, rule documentation.
10 — Collaborative Games: elicitation, team alignment.
11 — Concept Modelling: requirements modeling, domain vocabulary.
12 — Data Dictionary: data requirements, system integration.
13 — Data Flow Diagrams: process analysis, system boundary definition.
14 — Data Mining: analysis, pattern discovery.
15 — Data Modelling: data requirements, ERD design.
16 — Decision Analysis: solution evaluation, option comparison.
17 — Decision Modelling: business rules, DMN tables.
18 — Document Analysis: elicitation, existing-state documentation.
19 — Estimation: planning, effort sizing.
20 — Financial Analysis: business case, ROI calculation.
21 — Focus Groups: elicitation, user research.
22 — Functional Decomposition: requirements architecture, scope breakdown.
23 — Glossary: communication, shared vocabulary.
24 — Interface Analysis: requirements analysis, system integration.
25 — Interviews: elicitation, stakeholder deep-dive.
26 — Item Tracking: requirements management, issue log.
27 — Lessons Learned: retrospective, process improvement.
28 — Metrics and KPIs: performance measurement, success criteria.
29 — Mind Mapping: elicitation, concept organization.
30 — Non-Functional Requirements Analysis: requirements analysis, quality attributes.
31 — Observation: elicitation, process discovery.
32 — Organizational Modelling: current state, org chart analysis.
33 — Prioritization: requirements management, backlog ordering.
34 — Process Analysis: current state, bottleneck identification.
35 — Process Modelling: requirements modeling, BPMN design.
36 — Prototyping: elicitation, validation.
37 — Reviews: verification, quality assurance.
38 — Risk Analysis and Management: strategy, evaluation, contingency planning.
39 — Roles and Permissions Matrix: requirements analysis, access control.
40 — Root Cause Analysis: problem analysis, defect investigation.
41 — Scope Modelling: strategy analysis, boundary definition.
42 — Sequence Diagrams: requirements modeling, interaction design.
43 — Stakeholder List, Map, or Personas: stakeholder analysis, engagement planning.
44 — State Modelling: requirements modeling, lifecycle analysis.
45 — Survey or Questionnaire: elicitation, broad stakeholder input.
46 — SWOT Analysis: current state, strategic assessment.
47 — Use Cases and Scenarios: requirements modeling, functional specification.
48 — User Stories: agile requirements, sprint planning.
49 — Vendor Assessment: solution evaluation, procurement.
50 — Workshops: elicitation, consensus building.
